title: Navigation, Search, and Hero Patterns
description: Covers header-level navigation (navbar, mega menu, mobile menu, search) alongside full hero variants to exercise canonical top-of-page components.

regions.heading: Header Navigation Shell
regions.description: Navigation primitives rendered inside the page header to validate menu, search, and layout guidance.

regions.heading: Hero Variants
regions.description: Every hero canonical type sequenced to confirm prompt coverage and importer handling.

regions.heading: Hierarchical Breadcrumb Navigation
regions.description: Breadcrumb aliases (singular + plural) rendered separately so importer sees both canonical strings.

regions.heading: Sidebar Navigation
regions.description: Secondary navigation tree surfaced in the sidebar slot.

regions.heading: Footer Shell
regions.description: Footer component verifies layout, legal links, and nested column rendering.
